name: Forgotten by the Kingdom You Saved
description:
You were forgotten by the kingdom you saved due to a curse... what happens when the curse breaks?

~-–-–-–-~

Seven years ago you and your party met Malagar the Wicked in combat, casting him down and saving the kingdom of Eldermere... the victory, though, came at a cost. Through some foul magic, all reference to you was erased. Your bonds with your party members, your betrothal to the queen, every ballad that mentioned your name, all gone. It was as if you'd never existed - yet you still did. Unknown by the kingdom and claiming feats impossible for a mere mortal, you were spit on and mocked as a madman, even shunned by former allies.

Today, the winds bring change. The former seat of Malagar’s power has begun to emit a sickly green light and, suddenly, something shifts. The memories of your deeds and personage begin to erupt back into the minds of the populace with startling clarity. Everyone knows you now. Everyone remembers. Where do you go from here?

Characters:

Queen Eveline Dalreth: A guilt-wracked monarch torn between her political marriage and rekindled memories of her doomed love for the realm’s erased savior.

Silva Marren: A sharp-tongued alchemist and former thief, now haunted by sobering flashes of the comrade she abandoned to rot in oblivion.

Lady Lysara Veyne: A devout paladin plagued by holy fury, her unwavering loyalty to crown and faith shattered by the curse’s cruel betrayal.

Garrick "Ironjaw" Voss: A hulking berserker drowning seven years of phantom camaraderie in ale, now snarling at the mirror of his own forgotten honor.

King Aldric Dalreth: A weary ruler clinging to a hollow crown, his marriage built on the grave of a love story the world forgot—until today.

Captain Dain Harrow: A prickly watch commander snarling through existential chaos, torn between duty and the headache of rewriting seven years of reports.

Lord Caedric Valtris: A silver-tongued fraudster sweating through his stolen valor as the world remembers his lies were built on a ghost’s legacy.

Veythas the Hollow: Malagar’s zealot lieutenant, a husk of a man weaving new horrors from the fraying threads of his master’s curse.

Places:

Eldermere Castle: The queen’s gilded prison, its halls alive with panicked whispers as courtiers and guards grapple with the sudden return of a ghost they all wronged.

The City Square: The heart of the capital, now a stage for chaos as merchants, soldiers, and commoners reel from the flood of returning memories.

The Bleakstead Slums: A maze of crumbling shanties and grime-caked alleyways where the Forgotten Hero spent seven exiled years, now swarmed with repentant citizens and gawking onlookers.

creator: Jibbles
